project.name: TUGAS-AKHIR-VAR-TATA-SURYA
project.currentFocus: Apply super-micro AR scale (solar 0.010, detail 0.008-0.010), keep hit-zones tappable, and enforce portrait camera constraints for 9:16 mobile scanning.

lastAchievements: Set final super-micro model scale: solar root 0.010, fallback 0.055, root Y 0.025 for very small marker appearance on phones.
Adjusted planet detail scales into requested 0.008-0.010 range across all planets.
Improved tap usability while model is tiny by increasing hit-zone radii and raising minimum hit-zone wrapper scale to 0.22.
Applied portrait-first camera constraints preset (9:16, 720x1280 ideal) plus fallback landscape preset on rotation.
Kept viewport layer sync and zoom-min reset path so mobile preview stays upright and less over-zoomed.
pendingIssues: Final visual calibration still requires real-device check on Infinix Note 40 and iPhone Safari.
If tap hit-zones drift after final marker scale, hitZonePosition/hitZoneRadius tuning is still required.
nextBestActions: Run full on-device checklist for AR start, switch camera, close scanner, and reopen scanner cycle.
After hit-zone tuning finalizes, set DEBUG_HIT_ZONES to false for production visual cleanliness.
Capture browser-specific notes for Android Chrome vs iOS Safari camera-switch limitations.
validationState: npm run preview startup + HTTP probe (127.0.0.1:4173): PASS (200)

designContinuity.currentConceptualAnchor: Handheld optical instrument panel (camera-first scanner HUD).
